productionModulesExtended.reason: Adds generic reaction/interrupt payload taxonomy route subject families and a non-durable ResolveBattleInterrupt route trace event so copied connector rows can be observed through public reducer route entrypoints.

adapterModules.adapterScope: Replays the copied battle-runtime-reaction-interrupt-payload-taxonomy.route.mbt.qnt connector rows through public battle reducer route entrypoints. Expected rows are derived from copied connector action bodies; observed rows come from BattleEntrypointTrace.route_events.

expectedNextReuse.driver: future generic reaction payload, interrupt-stack, and reaction-window route connectors that distinguish interrupt resolution from ordinary subject resolution
